card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life. Then you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card. As long as you control seven or more lands with different names, if you would draw a card except the first one you draw in each of your draw steps, draw two cards instead.

card.name: Molly, Worldwalker
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, Molly deals 1 damage to each opponent. Put a +1/+1 counter on her. As long as you control seven or more lands with different names, double all damage that sources you control would deal to your opponents and permanents your opponents control.

card.name: Molly, Worldwalker
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, Molly deals 1 damage to each opponent. Put a +1/+1 counter on her. As long as you control seven or more lands with different names, double all damage that sources you control would deal to your opponents and permanents your opponents control.

card.name: Molly, Worldwalker
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, Molly deals 1 damage to each opponent. Put a +1/+1 counter on her. As long as you control seven or more lands with different names, double all damage that sources you control would deal to your opponents and permanents your opponents control.
